# DAIRIA Law — AI-Powered French Employment Law for International Businesses

> DAIRIA Law helps foreign companies navigate French employment law through two complementary services: DAIRIA AI (multilingual legal AI assistant) and DAIRIA Avocats (English-speaking employment law firm based in Lyon, France).

## About DAIRIA

DAIRIA is a French legal technology company founded by Sofiane Coly, attorney-at-law (avocat au Barreau de Lyon). We combine artificial intelligence with deep employment law expertise to serve international businesses operating in France.

### DAIRIA AI
- Multilingual AI assistant covering French employment law
- Available in English, German, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, Italian
- Instant answers on hiring, termination, workplace regulations, payroll compliance
- Trained on French Labor Code, Social Security Code, and collective bargaining agreements
- URL: https://dairia-law.com/dairia-ai

### DAIRIA Avocats
- Employment law firm (cabinet d'avocats) based in Lyon, France
- Specializing in employer-side employment law (droit du travail côté employeur)
- Services: hiring compliance, termination procedures, workplace investigations, collective bargaining, restructuring, litigation defense
- English-speaking lawyers for foreign subsidiaries in France
- URL: https://dairia-avocats.com

## Key Practice Areas
- Employment contracts (CDI, CDD, temporary work)
- Dismissal procedures (licenciement, rupture conventionnelle)
- Workplace harassment and discrimination
- Employee representative bodies (CSE)
- Collective bargaining and agreements
- Restructuring and redundancy plans (PSE)
- French payroll compliance (cotisations, URSSAF)
- Workplace health and safety (AT/MP)
- Remote work policies (télétravail)
- International employment law
